shortDescription: Looking for the best WPC decking supplier and dealer in Gurgaon? Goals Floors provides premium 100% waterproof outdoor flooring in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR. Upgrade your luxury balconies, swimming pools, and terraces with anti-slip, zero-maintenance wooden decking at wholesale prices.
longDescription: Goals Floors is the premier WPC decking supplier and dealer in Gurgaon, Delhi, and Noida. Transform your exterior spaces permanently with the finest WPC decking in Gurgaon. Designed for luxury balconies, swimming pool decks, rooftop terraces, cafes, and farmhouse landscapes, our outdoor flooring in Gurgaon combines the timeless aesthetic of natural hardwood with advanced weatherproof engineering. Manufactured using high-performance A+ Wood Plastic Composite technology, our decking boards are completely 100% waterproof, termite-proof, UV-resistant, and structurally stable for long-term outdoor performance. Unlike traditional wooden flooring that cracks, swells, fades, or rots under the harsh Delhi NCR sun and heavy monsoons, Goals Floors WPC Decking is specifically engineered for extreme climates. The anti-slip textured surface ensures maximum safety around pools, spa areas, and outdoor walkways. Installed using precision stainless steel hidden-clip systems, the flooring achieves a seamless screw-free architectural finish with proper water drainage underneath. Get your premium outdoor flooring directly from the top supplier and dealer in Gurgaon for reliable project support and bulk commercial supply.

installation: Our WPC Decking systems in Gurugram are installed over precision-leveled aluminum or galvanized structural frameworks that ensure proper water drainage, ventilation, and long-term outdoor stability. The heavy WPC decking boards are securely locked in place using stainless steel concealed clips, creating a seamless, high-end architectural finish without any visible screws, nails, or exposed fasteners.
maintenance: Designed specifically for low-maintenance outdoor living in India, our WPC outdoor flooring requires absolutely no polishing, painting, varnishing, or waterproof coating. Routine cleaning can be easily performed using a regular water hose, mild soap, and a soft outdoor brush to effortlessly wash away outdoor dust and maintain its premium appearance for years.

faqs.question: What is WPC decking?
faqs.answer:
WPC decking is an outdoor flooring material made from a combination of wood fibers and thermoplastics that is designed to replicate the appearance of natural wood while offering improved durability and weather resistance.

It is commonly used for terraces, balconies, gardens, pool decks, and commercial outdoor spaces because it requires less maintenance than traditional timber decking.

faqs.question: What is the price of WPC decking in India?
faqs.answer:
WPC decking in India typically costs between ₹250 and ₹1,000 per square foot depending on thickness, profile, finish, brand, and installation requirements.

• Entry-level WPC decking: ₹250–₹450 per sq. ft.
• Mid-range WPC decking: ₹450–₹700 per sq. ft.
• Premium WPC decking: ₹700–₹1,000+ per sq. ft.

Installation charges are usually additional and vary by project complexity.

faqs.question: Is WPC 100% waterproof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, high-quality WPC decking is highly water resistant and is commonly marketed as 100% waterproof for practical outdoor applications.

Unlike natural wood, WPC does not absorb significant moisture, making it suitable for terraces, balconies, and poolside areas. Proper installation and drainage are still important for long-term performance.

faqs.question: What is the lifespan of WPC outside?
faqs.answer:
Quality WPC decking typically lasts 15 to 25 years outdoors when properly installed and maintained.

Its lifespan depends on product quality, UV resistance, drainage, foot traffic, and environmental conditions. In Gurugram and Delhi NCR, premium UV-stabilized WPC products generally perform better under intense summer temperatures and seasonal weather changes.

faqs.question: What are the disadvantages of WPC decking?
faqs.answer:
WPC decking offers many advantages but also has some limitations.

• It is usually more expensive than basic wood options initially.
• Dark-colored boards can become warm under direct sunlight.
• Lower-quality products may fade or warp over time.

Selecting premium-grade decking and professional installation helps minimize these issues.

faqs.question: Is WPC cheaper than wood?
faqs.answer:
WPC is often more cost-effective than premium hardwood over the long term, but it may cost more than some basic wood options initially.

Natural wood typically requires regular polishing, sealing, and maintenance, while WPC requires significantly less upkeep. Over several years, maintenance savings can make WPC the more economical choice.

faqs.question: Is WPC 100% termite proof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, WPC is highly resistant to termites because it contains plastic-based components and does not serve as a food source like natural wood.

This makes WPC a popular choice for outdoor flooring and cladding applications where termite attacks are a concern. However, surrounding wooden structures should still be protected separately if present.

faqs.question: How to install WPC decking?
faqs.answer:
WPC decking is installed by creating a stable substructure and securing decking boards using clips, screws, or specialized fastening systems.

• Prepare a level and well-drained base.
• Install support joists or framing.
• Fix decking boards with recommended fasteners.
• Maintain proper expansion gaps and drainage spacing.

Professional installation is recommended for the best durability and finish.

faqs.question: Is WPC decking fire proof?
faqs.answer:
No, WPC decking is not completely fire proof, but many premium products are manufactured with fire-retardant properties that help slow flame spread.

Fire performance varies by manufacturer and product grade. If fire resistance is a priority, it is important to verify the product's fire rating before installation.

faqs.question: Which is better WPC decking or PVC decking?
faqs.answer:
WPC decking is generally better for natural appearance and strength, while PVC decking is often preferred for maximum moisture resistance and lower maintenance.

• WPC provides a more realistic wood-like look.
• PVC offers superior resistance to moisture and staining.
• WPC is usually preferred for premium residential projects.

For many outdoor projects in Delhi NCR, WPC decking is chosen because it offers a balance of aesthetics, durability, and value.

installationSteps.title: Structural Framework Preparation
points: Create a strong base frame using Aluminum or Iron pipes.
Keep a slight slope so that rainwater can drain easily underneath.

installationSteps.title: Fix the First Board
points: Place the first wooden board perfectly straight along the wall.
Secure the starting edge using specialized starter clips.

installationSteps.title: Concealed Clip Locking System
points: Slide the stainless steel clips into the side grooves of the board.
Screw these clips directly into the metal frame for a tight hold.

installationSteps.title: Leave Expansion Gaps
points: Leave a tiny 5mm gap between the ends of the boards.
This allows the floor to safely expand during the hot summer without bending.
